creator: irenepila_
caption:
Un treno a vapore attraverso il North Yorkshire, da Pickering a Goathland.

Campi, paesaggi mozzafiato e quella luce che sembra uscita da un film.
E poi, il Castle Howard, dove Bridgerton prende vita. 💛

____________

transcription.text: Your smile, miles wide And it was not an invitation Should've kissed you anyway Should've kissed you anyway And it was not convenient, no But your girlfriend was away Should've kissed you anyway
